message:
fix: prevent focus trap deadlock, sentinel leak, and shutdown hangs

- FocusManager::push_trap() now handles empty/missing focus groups
  without deadlocking
- Virtualized scroll API no longer leaks usize::MAX sentinel
- Subscription stop() and effect-queue shutdown use bounded timeouts

Partially addresses #34, #35

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
